text: Pig farming (piggery) offers high returns with relatively low maintenance compared to poultry. Start with 2-5 piglets. Piglets cost UGX 80,000-150,000 each. Pigs reach market weight (80-100kg) in 6-8 months. Feed costs: kitchen waste (free) supplemented with bran/maize (UGX 100,000-200,000/month for 5 pigs). A mature pig sells for UGX 400,000-800,000 depending on weight and breed. Pork demand is consistently high in Uganda — consumed in bars, restaurants, and homes. Sow can produce 8-12 piglets per litter, 2 litters/year. After first cycle, breeding stock generates continuous income. Total startup for 5 piglets + simple housing: UGX 800,000-1,500,000.
